title: Bug fixes (3) + systemic risk signal engine integration

bugs_found: crash_timeline.py: VIX sigma multiplied by sqrt(252) — VIX is already annualized, so sigma was 15.87x overstated (VIX=20 → sigma=3.17 instead of 0.20), producing wildly inflated crash probabilities

anomaly_detector.py:195: fillna(0) banned per CLAUDE.md — Bayesian changepoint detection was filling NaN with 0 instead of forward-filling, biasing changepoint probability toward zero at series boundaries
systemic_risk.py: absorption_ratio n_components=5 with 6 assets gave AR≈0.998 by construction (5/6 eigenvalues = 83%+ variance), making the indicator permanently flagged as 'systemic stress'
observation.gap_identified: Systemic risk indicators (Kritzman turbulence index + absorption ratio) were computed but not wired into the signal engine — they existed as standalone metrics with no influence on buy/sell signals

bugs_fixed: crash_timeline.py: Removed erroneous sqrt(252) multiplier from VIX→sigma conversion. VIX is already annualized implied vol, so correct conversion is simply VIX/100
anomaly_detector.py: Replaced fillna(0) with ffill().bfill() for BOCPD result reindexing — preserves temporal continuity of changepoint probabilities
systemic_risk.py: Capped n_components at max(1, n_assets//3) instead of n_assets//2, so AR is meaningful (2 components on 6 assets instead of 5 on 6)
implementation.feature_built: Integrated systemic risk (turbulence + absorption ratio) as 11th signal engine component. Added get_systemic_risk_signal() function that converts turbulence percentile, AR level, and AR 1-month change into a [-1, +1] score. Wired into signal engine with regime-adaptive weights: 10% default, 9% Bull, 14% Bear, 16% Volatile. Connected data flow through stock router and lab data_generator.

limitations: Systemic risk signal is computed from only 6 assets (SP500, NASDAQ, Russell, Gold, HYG, LQD) — broader asset coverage would improve sensitivity
VIX sigma bug fix will change crash_timeline output significantly — downstream consumers should verify new (correct) probability ranges
AR threshold levels (0.50, 0.75, 0.85) and turbulence percentile cutoffs (30, 80, 90) are heuristic, not empirically calibrated
assessment.self_critique: Could have added a backtest comparison showing crash_timeline before/after the VIX fix. The systemic risk signal thresholds deserve empirical calibration against historical crisis periods rather than using round numbers.

next_steps: Calibrate systemic risk signal thresholds against GFC/COVID/2022 periods
Expand systemic risk to include more assets (DXY, crude, Treasury ETFs)
Add crash_timeline output validation test with known VIX/sigma pairs
Wire copula VaR into portfolio analysis response
Integrate factor model exposures into stock analysis page
